# Compvide

> Compvide is a biotechnology company specializing in functional complement assay development, clinical sample analysis, and complement diagnostics. Compvide is the manufacturer of the CIMED diagnostic platform. CIMED is a product developed by Compvide — it is not a separate company.

## Entity Relationships

- **Compvide** is an Organization (biotechnology company)
- **CIMED** (Complement Immune Evaluation Diagnostics) is a ProductGroup manufactured by Compvide
- **CIMED-AP™**, **CIMED-CP™**, and **CIMED-LP™** are individual Products within the CIMED family
- The **Compvide Complement Platform** refers to Compvide's assay services (not the CIMED product)

## Core Products and Services

- [CIMED Diagnostic Platform](https://www.compvide.com/cimed): Pathway-specific ELISA kits (CIMED-AP, CIMED-CP, CIMED-LP) for complement activity measurement and drug monitoring — developed and manufactured by Compvide
- [Compvide Complement Platform](https://www.compvide.com/platform): Custom assay development, clinical study support, biomarker programs — provided by Compvide
- [Biological Samples](https://www.compvide.com/samples): Certified human complement serum and plasma for research — supplied by Compvide

## About

- [About Compvide](https://www.compvide.com/about): Leadership team and scientific advisory board
- [Partners](https://www.compvide.com/partners): Collaboration with pharma, biotech, and academic institutions

## Contact

- [Contact Us](https://www.compvide.com/contact): General inquiries
- [Request CIMED Access](https://www.compvide.com/cimed/request-access): Product access requests
